    已过时的 API

    目录

    • 方法
    • 已过时的 方法
      方法
      说明
      com.zenith.command.api.CommandUsage.args(String, CommandCategory, String, List<String>)
      com.zenith.command.api.CommandUsage.full(String, CommandCategory, String, List<String>, List<String>)
      com.zenith.command.api.CommandUsage.simple(String, CommandCategory, String)
      com.zenith.command.api.CommandUsage.simpleAliases(String, CommandCategory, String, List<String>)
      com.zenith.mc.block.BlockDataManager.isAir(Block)
      Use Block.isAir() instead
      com.zenith.mc.block.BlockDataManager.isReplaceable(int)
      Use Block.replaceable() instead
      com.zenith.mc.entity.EntityDataManager.getAttachment(int)
      Use EntityData.entityAttachment() instead.
      com.zenith.mc.entity.EntityDataManager.getEntityData(int)
      Use EntityRegistry.REGISTRY instead.
      com.zenith.util.ChatUtil.isWhisperCommand(String)
